productDisplayName: Baggit Women Oscar Opart Brown Wallet
description: Worry no longer about managing money, cards and coins in your tote bag! Organise your everyday essentials into this stylish wallet from baggit. This three-fold timeless piece is on the top of our wishlist this year. A sophisticated addition to your accessory collection, you can carry this piece in your hand or pop it into your bag.Dimensions: 19 cm x 9.5 cmCrafted from genuine leatherette, has a flap style three-fold opening with a magnetic button closureA velvet strip along the upper for styleSix card holders, two pockets, a key holder and an id holder on the left foldOne compartment, a zippered pocket and two card holders on the centre foldOne pocket on the inner flapA zippered pocket on the backCareWipe with clean, damp cloth to remove dirt
